allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "Post"})

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\GeneralRepos\\knessetIL\\apps\\api"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-Location 'D:\\GeneralRepos\\knessetIL\\apps\\api'; .\\venv\\Scripts\\activate; uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep 5; Write-Host "API window launched")

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-Location 'D:\\GeneralRepos\\knessetIL'; npx pnpm -F @knesset/web dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Frontend window launched")
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { Write-Host "API not reachable: $_" })
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/votes?limit=3" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty pagination } catch { "Error: $_" })
